query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-vla: unifying vision-language-action modeling across tasks, envir" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core mechanism (bridging vision-language representations to action spaces in VLA models) and domain (robotic VLA modeling) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing an alternative paradigm and empirical baseline for the specific technical challenge of extending or optimizing VLA architectures.
